reviews.review_description: This game means SO much to me and my friend. I would love to see this game alive again. Unfortunately after unlocking the safe with the key card in level 8, you get trapped in the level because the button doesn't work to open the last door in the ground. If you you could me, and many others would love to see this game back, it had so much potential and seems to be almost finished!

reviews.review_title: It's a good game but why so buggy & hard
reviews.review_description: I genuinely like this game, it's just, there's a lot of bugs. On every level, if you press "go home" before starting, there's a chance you get teleported under the map. On level 10, Michael is really fast. I'd be okay if he got a 25% speed debuff because my furthest run on level 10 got me to the shutting doors. I wouldn't say I'm terrible, but I'm not saying I'm good. Also, instead of returning to his start location, Michael spawns wherever he killed you the run before, meaning if you want a normal run, you have to restart the game over and over. Please fix, and please make it to where people like me (buns at the game) can win.
